import React from 'react'; import { useAuth } from '../../contexts/AuthContext'; import './CustomerDashboard.css'; const CustomerProfile = () => { const { user } = useAuth(); return (

My Profile

Personal Information

First Name
{user?.firstName}
Last Name
{user?.lastName}
Email
{user?.email}
Phone
{user?.phone || 'Not provided'}
Address
{user?.address || 'Not provided'}

Account Information

Account Type
{user?.role}
Terms Accepted
{user?.termsAccepted ? 'Yes' : 'No'}
); }; export default CustomerProfile;
